proposal_summary: This proposal requests an additional 4 million ARB to increase the Stylus Sprint Committee's budget to fund exceptional applications that were excluded due to initial budget constraints.

disclosed_entities.name: Stylus Sprint multisig
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: the funds will be sent to the existing MSS-controlled Stylus Sprint multisig.

disclosed_entities.name: Entropy
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Entropy and the committee have no conflicts of interest

claimed_actions.raw_action: Transfer 4,000,000 ARB to the Stylus Sprint multisig
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Extend the funding opportunities to promising projects that were not initially accepted into the Sprint due to budget constraints.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: The Stylus Sprint committee is requesting an additional 4,000,000 ARB to extend its Stylus Sprint budget. If approved, the funds will be sent to the existing MSS-controlled Stylus Sprint multisig.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal only requests a straightforward transfer of funds to an existing multisig.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: If approved, the funds will be sent to the existing MSS-controlled Stylus Sprint multisig.

limitations: No specific smart contract addresses or target addresses are provided in the text, only names of the entities.
